OverviewPipelineSalesforceLeads

Pipeline

Agent execution and DAG overview

Paused — no API credits

Pipeline DAG

ScoutFind businesses without websites
ProfileScrape business data (Google, social, website)
BrandExtract colours, fonts, logo, photos
QualifyScore and filter viable leads
AssignAuto-assign to nearest salesperson
BriefGenerate copy directives per business type
ComposeAI-generate unique website (Claude)
QAValidate HTML, accessibility, brand consistency

Emergency Controls

These override the autonomous system. Use only when intervention is needed.
